category_sources: source_facts.description: "Computer algebra system designed for fast computations in number theory".
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official PARI/GP project site at pari.math.u-bordeaux.fr.
docs_sources: Official PARI/GP site provides dedicated documentation under /dochtml/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official PARI/GP site is the authoritative project source and publishes its Git repository under pari.math.u-bordeaux.fr/git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a number-theory computer algebra system with gp CLI tools.
